A/N▹

I'm sorry for my absence, I've been busy with a Halloween Series and on top of that my laptop gave up on me. Like it literally decided that it no longer wanted to go on. Which fucking sucks tbh. I’m trying to post on my iPad but it feels very off and I kinda don’t like it. I offer this on a gold platter as an apology as there will be a delay in future posts :3

Disclaimers▹

  • Made and test-messaged with JLLM only.

So any odd behaviors such as repetitiveness, quick memory loss, nonsense replies, speaking for user, out-of-character replies, and poor message quality may happen and they're not my fault.
